options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose logging. This is equivalent to --log-level debug.

options.name: --attach-debugger
options.description: Launch the system debugger and break immediately

options.name: --log-file
options.description: Send log output to specified file.

options.name: --log-filter
options.description: Filter logs by category. The category can be seen in the logs inside []. For example: [Compiler].

options.name: --wait-for-debugger
options.description: Stop execution on startup until an external debugger to attach to this process

options.name: --project-graph-enabled
options.description: Enable MSBuild Graph workspace loading. Should be faster than the default, but is experimental.

options.name: --adaptive-lsp-server-enabled
options.description: Enable LSP Server based on FSharp.Data.Adaptive. Should be more stable, but is experimental.

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the log verbosity to a specific level.

options.name: --state-directory
options.description: Set the directory to store the state of the server. This should be a per-workspace location, not a shared-workspace location. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-fsautocomplete-0.83.0-1c050db9e9ba4df884c061070ef0c256]

options.name: --otel-exporter-enabled
options.description: Enabled OpenTelemetry exporter. See https://opentelemetry.io/docs/reference/specification/protocol/exporter/ for environment variables to configure for the exporter.

options.name: --use-fcs-transparent-compiler
options.description: Use Transparent Compiler in FSharp.Compiler.Services. Should have better performance characteristics, but is experimental. See https://github.com/dotnet/fsharp/pull/15179 for more details.
